mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock (item_id, stock_amount, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{stockAmount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_id = i.item_id AND i.store_id = #{storeId} AND i.is_active = b'1' SET s.stock_amount = #{amount}, s.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE s.item_id = #{itemId}

UPDATE stock s JOIN item i ON i.item_id = s.item_id SET s.stock_amount = s.stock_amount + #{amount}, s.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE s.item_id = #{itemId} AND i.store_id = #{storeId} AND i.is_active = b'1'
mapper.select: SELECT s.stock_id, s.item_id, i.item_name, s.stock_amount, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_id = i.item_id WHERE s.item_id = #{itemId} AND i.store_id = #{storeId} AND i.is_active = b'1'
